name: How to Add Products to Your Store
body:
[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To display products on your storefront, products must first be grouped into "},{"text":"categories (collections)","bold":true},{"text":" and then published through your store’s "},{"text":"navigation menu","bold":true},{"text":". This ensures customers can easily discover products and that newly added items automatically appear on the correct store pages."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"This article explains how to set up navigation so your products are visible on your store page."}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"
How Product Visibility Works in Marcos Commerce Cloud"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"In Commerce Cloud, products are not displayed on the storefront individually by default. Instead:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Products are grouped into "},{"text":"collections","bold":true},{"text":" (categories)"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Collections are linked to "},{"text":"navigation menu pages","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Any product added to a collection automatically appears on the corresponding store page"}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"This setup allows your storefront to stay updated without manually adding products to pages every time.

"}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Step 1: Select the Sales Channel"}]},{"type":"ol","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Go to "},{"text":"Commerce Cloud","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Navigate to "},{"text":"Sales Channels","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Select the sales channel where you want the products to appear (for example, your primary storefront)"}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/RYVSTY87CGNY/image.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/RYVSTY87CGNY/image.png","name":"image.png","type":"image/png","size":801959,"width":1920,"height":1075,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2FRYVSTY87CGNY%2Fimage.png","active":true,"mediaID":2037,"dateInserted":"2026-01-26T20:22:52+00:00","insertUserID":1178,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"1178","embedType":"image"}}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"All navigation and product visibility settings are managed at the sales-channel level."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Step 2: Open the Navigation Settings"}]},{"type":"ol","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Inside the selected sales channel, click "},{"text":"Navigation","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"You will see a list of available menus, typically:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Header (Top) Menu","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Footer Menus","bold":true}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/CIOMOJBZ73CA/image.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/CIOMOJBZ73CA/image.png","name":"image.png","type":"image/png","size":221978,"width":1440,"height":806,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2FCIOMOJBZ73CA%2Fimage.png","active":true,"mediaID":2038,"dateInserted":"2026-01-26T20:23:13+00:00","insertUserID":1178,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"1178","embedType":"image"}}]}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"For product discovery, it is recommended to add collections to the "},{"text":"header menu","bold":true},{"text":", as this is the most visible area for customers."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Step 3: Edit the Header (Home) Menu"}]},{"type":"ol","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Locate the "},{"text":"Home Menu","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Click the "},{"text":"three-dot menu","bold":true},{"text":" next to it"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Select "},{"text":"Edit","bold":true}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/2D5FQ5463PS5/image.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/2D5FQ5463PS5/image.png","name":"image.png","type":"image/png","size":744841,"width":1920,"height":1075,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2F2D5FQ5463PS5%2Fimage.png","active":true,"mediaID":2039,"dateInserted":"2026-01-26T20:23:41+00:00","insertUserID":1178,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"1178","embedType":"image"}}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"This opens the navigation editor where you can manage menu items and links."}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"
Step 4: Add a New Collection Page"}]},{"type":"ol","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"In the "},{"text":"Edit Navigation","bold":true},{"text":" screen:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Click on "},{"text":"Add New Page","bold":true},{"text":" on the "},{"text":"Menu Page Name","bold":true},{"text":" (for example: "},{"text":"Products","italic":true},{"text":", "},{"text":"Furniture Accessories","italic":true},{"text":", or "},{"text":"Beauty","italic":true},{"text":")"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"This will open setup to enter category menus"}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/KVQJQJD9BQO2/image.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/KVQJQJD9BQO2/image.png","name":"image.png","type":"image/png","size":185002,"width":1440,"height":806,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2FKVQJQJD9BQO2%2Fimage.png","active":true,"mediaID":2040,"dateInserted":"2026-01-26T20:24:02+00:00","insertUserID":1178,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"1178","embedType":"image"}}]}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Under "},{"text":"Link To","bold":true},{"text":", click the dropdown"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Select "},{"text":"Collection","bold":true}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/8BJ4UYW1Z4EO/image.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/8BJ4UYW1Z4EO/image.png","name":"image.png","type":"image/png","size":768440,"width":1920,"height":1075,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2F8BJ4UYW1Z4EO%2Fimage.png","active":true,"mediaID":2042,"dateInserted":"2026-01-26T20:25:03+00:00","insertUserID":1178,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"1178","embedType":"image"}}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Choose the collection you want to publish (for example: "},{"text":"Beauty","italic":true},{"text":", "},{"text":"Furniture Accessories","italic":true},{"text":", or any custom category)"}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/ARWP6M1SCGJL/image.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/ARWP6M1SCGJL/image.png","name":"image.png","type":"image/png","size":779149,"width":1920,"height":1075,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2FARWP6M1SCGJL%2Fimage.png","active":true,"mediaID":2043,"dateInserted":"2026-01-26T20:25:31+00:00","insertUserID":1178,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"1178","embedType":"image"}}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Each collection represents a product category that already contains products or will contain products in the future."}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Step 5: Save the Navigation Menu"}]},{"type":"ol","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"After selecting the collection and naming the menu page, click "},{"text":"Save","bold":true}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/3F321MRGWOND/image.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/3F321MRGWOND/image.png","name":"image.png","type":"image/png","size":697233,"width":1920,"height":1075,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2F3F321MRGWOND%2Fimage.png","active":true,"mediaID":2044,"dateInserted":"2026-01-26T20:26:06+00:00","insertUserID":1178,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"1178","embedType":"image"}}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"You will see a notification: Navigation updated successfully"}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/LAWS5G60OUAT/image.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/LAWS5G60OUAT/image.png","name":"image.png","type":"image/png","size":728957,"width":1920,"height":1075,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2FLAWS5G60OUAT%2Fimage.png","active":true,"mediaID":2045,"dateInserted":"2026-01-26T20:26:27+00:00","insertUserID":1178,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"1178","embedType":"image"}}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"The new menu item is now added to your store’s navigation"}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/UMI99NK6KZ8N/image.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/UMI99NK6KZ8N/image.png","name":"image.png","type":"image/png","size":734552,"width":1920,"height":1075,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2FUMI99NK6KZ8N%2Fimage.png","active":true,"mediaID":2046,"dateInserted":"2026-01-26T20:26:54+00:00","insertUserID":1178,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"1178","embedType":"image"}}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"
Once saved:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Customers will see the new menu item on the storefront"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Clicking the menu item opens a page showing all products in that collection"}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/TDWD4742ETE2/image.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/TDWD4742ETE2/image.png","name":"image.png","type":"image/png","size":1551731,"width":1344,"height":768,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2FTDWD4742ETE2%2Fimage.png","active":true,"mediaID":2047,"dateInserted":"2026-01-26T20:27:24+00:00","insertUserID":1178,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"1178","embedType":"image"}}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" After setup:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Your store menu may show options like "},{"text":"Home","bold":true},{"text":", "},{"text":"Contact Us","bold":true},{"text":", and "},{"text":"Products","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"The "},{"text":"Products","bold":true},{"text":" page automatically displays all products assigned to the selected collection"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Any new product added to that collection appears on the store instantly, without additional configuration"}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Nested Menus"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Nested menus allow you to create a hierarchical navigation structure by adding menu items under a parent menu. This is useful when you want to group related product categories or pages together and keep your store navigation clean and easy to browse."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To create a nested menu:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Add a new menu item or use an existing one"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Drag the menu item and "},{"text":"hover it over another menu item","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"When it shifts to the right, release it to add it as a "},{"text":"child menu","bold":true}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Once saved, the nested item will appear as a dropdown under its parent menu on the storefront. This helps customers navigate through product categories more intuitively, especially when your store has multiple product groups or collections."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/5O004M3A8LGZ/image.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/5O004M3A8LGZ/image.png","name":"image.png","type":"image/png","size":1234945,"width":1920,"height":1084,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2F5O004M3A8LGZ%2Fimage.png","active":true,"mediaID":2048,"dateInserted":"2026-01-26T20:27:52+00:00","insertUserID":1178,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"1178","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]}]
